assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'The control plane must be upgraded before any node pools' and lists it as step 1 in the upgrade sequence

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides coordinating→master→data sequence with clear rationale: coordinating nodes are stateless (safest to test), masters are critical for cluster state but no data, data nodes are most critical with actual data

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (good - survives zone failures)' and confirms 'Regional pd-ssd confirmed for zone tolerance' in checklist

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides specific PDB YAML configuration with 'minAvailable: 2' for master nodes and explains the quorum requirement

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends 'maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0' for all three node pools (master, data, coordinating) and provides specific gcloud commands to configure these settings

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Includes health checks in pre-flight, provides curl commands to check cluster health, and includes post-upgrade validation steps to ensure GREEN status

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Includes 'PV reclaim policy is Retain' in both the pre-upgrade checklist and provides kubectl command to verify this setting

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl commands like 'kubectl get statefulsets -l app=elasticsearch' and 'kubectl get pods -l app=elasticsearch' to check StatefulSet status

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes snapshot creation in the pre-upgrade checklist and provides specific curl command to trigger a manual snapshot before starting the upgrade
